name.description: Name of the user (Length must be between 1 and 63 characters for PostgreSQL and between 1 and 32 characters for MySQL. First character must be an alphabet character (a-zA-Z). Your username cannot start with '_rdb' or in PostgreSQL, 'pg_'. Only a-zA-Z0-9_$- characters are accepted).

is_admin.description: Defines whether or not a user got administrative privileges on the Database Instance.
